content: Backend: Add /api/admin/sparks/stats endpoint (global aggregates) + /api/admin/sparks/recent (recent ledger across users)
Frontend: Build new SparksSection.js admin tab with KPIs, recent ledger, user search & adjust modal
Wire SparksSection into AdminPage.js and verify rendering
Polish Reports tab: AdminPageHeader + filter + AdminEmptyState + AdminStatusPill
Polish Users tab: AdminPageHeader + count + AdminStatusPill
Polish Foto-Queue (photos) tab: AdminPageHeader + empty state + grid layout
Polish Verifizierungen tab: AdminPageHeader + empty state + status pills
Polish Audit-Log tab: AdminPageHeader + filter + better row formatting
Polish System / Honeypots / Blog / Broadcasts / Payments / KI-Konfig / Legal / Promos / Team-Channels with consistent AdminPageHeader
Final verification screenshot test of all polished tabs
